action_text: Type "#SERIES-c8c8c533-7" into the filter value textbox for Short description
rationale: We need to complete the filter condition by entering the value that the "Short description" should contain.
After setting the filter value, we must run the filter to narrow the list to matching expense lines.

action_text: Press Enter in the filter value field to apply the filter
rationale: If pressing Enter in the value field applies the filter, this is a quick way to execute it without moving the mouse.

action_text: Click "Add Sort" in the filter toolbar
rationale: To prepare for identifying duplicates after filtering, adding a sort will help group identical short descriptions together.

action_text: Click the "Short description" column header to sort by that column
rationale: Sorting the table by "Short description" will visually group duplicate descriptions, aiding selection for deletion.
